what: Snap repositioned as persisted AI reasoning
why: Redefined snap from 'semantic checkpoint' to 'persisted AI reasoning'. Core insight: AI already thinks before acting — snap externalizes that thinking, not extra documentation burden. Established three clear creation categories: (A) no snap for simple Q&A, (B) snap with code changes records reasoning behind changes, (C) snap without code changes for investigation conclusions, direction decisions, non-code work. Removed feedback field from CLI and IntHub — snaps are fully immutable, user feedback becomes a new snap. Updated SKILL.md, cli.md EN/CN with new positioning, examples, and field tables.
